query:
INSERT INTO release_notes (title, summary, body, versionLabel, category, active, publishedAt, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES (
  'Points in Play Now Includes All Bonuses',
  'Your Points in Play display now shows your complete total including all boost bonuses earned. The leaderboard total and My Day screen are now perfectly aligned.',
  'We've fixed a display issue where the "Points in Play" metric on your My Day screen wasn't showing boost bonuses you'd already earned.

**What Changed:**
Your Points in Play now includes:
• Base points from completed daily logs
• Today's live task points (rules, proof, insight)
• All boost bonuses earned on previous days

**Why This Matters:**
This ensures complete transparency about your score. The number you see on My Day now matches exactly what determines your rank on the Board.

**No Action Needed:**
This is a display fix only. Your actual score and leaderboard position remain unchanged—we just made sure you can see the full picture.

Thanks for your commitment to the challenge. Keep pushing! 💪',
  '2026.05.11',
  'community_care',
  true,
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
